name: Privacy-Chromium Premium Edition - Recommended Extensions
description: Privacy-first extensions pre-configured for maximum protection

extensions.name: uBlock Origin
extensions.description: An efficient wide-spectrum content blocker. Fast, lean, and with 0 memory footprint.

extensions.name: Bitdefender TrafficLight
extensions.description: Blocks malicious content, detects phishing attempts, and adds security ratings to your search results.

extensions.name: Malwarebytes Browser Guard
extensions.description: Browser security extension that blocks malware, scam, and phishing attempts.

extensions.name: Privacy Badger
extensions.description: Protects your privacy by learning to block invisible trackers.

extensions.name: HTTPS Everywhere
extensions.description: Encrypt the web! Automatically use HTTPS security on many sites.

extensions.name: ClearURLs
extensions.description: Remove tracking parameters from URLs automatically.

extensions.name: Decentraleyes
extensions.description: Emulates Content Delivery Networks locally to avoid tracking.

extension_stores.name: Chrome Web Store
extension_stores.description: Official Chrome Web Store for extension installation

privacy_notice: All extensions in this list are configured to minimize data collection. Extensions are set to NOT remember browsing data, NOT send telemetry, and operate in local-only mode when possible.
